Reveal-once secret shape `whsec_${randomHex(32)}` satisfies /^whsec_[0-9a-f]{32}$/ regex. Contract addition (RotateWebhookSecretResponse extension at packages/contracts/src/webhooks.ts:100-108) is purely additive — `secret?` optional + new fields appended, backwards-compatible for existing consumers. Migration is forward-only and idempotent. No risk to existing endpoints (no backfill — previous_* stay NULL until next rotate). X-Webhook-Signature-Previous is a NEW public header — opt-in, no breaking change. Residual risk: @saas/webhook-verifier is single-key today; subscribers must hand-pick which key during the grace window (multi-key extension is an out-of-scope B5 tail item). Spec Proposal: webhook docs update for the new header (non-blocking docs-only follow-up). Recommended next: Task 0109 (console reveal-once modal, pure SDK consumer of RotateWebhookSecretResponse.secret, contract now locked on main); Task 0110 (CLI `webhook secrets rotate` subcommand) parallel-safe with 0109.
